languages.original_text: "Lady Navigator, while that xenos wretch was dissecting me, it boasted about your torture mechanism. I am sorry you had to endure that."

languages.text: "Леди-навигатор, когда ксеносское отродье иссекало меня, оно хвасталось вашим пыточным механизмом. Мне жаль, что вам пришлось это пережить".
"Lady Navigator, while that xenos wretch was dissecting me, it boasted about your torture mechanism. I am sorry you had to endure that."
languages.original_text: "Леди-навигатор, когда ксеносское отродье иссекало меня, оно хвасталось вашим пыточным механизмом. Мне жаль, что вам пришлось это пережить".

traits.locale_text: "Lady Navigator, while that xenos wretch was dissecting me, it boasted about your torture mechanism. I am sorry you had to endure that."
"Lady Navigator, while that xenos wretch was dissecting me, it boasted about your torture mechanism. I am sorry you had to endure that."
"Lady Navigator, while that xenos wretch was dissecting me, it boasted about your torture mechanism. I am sorry you had to endure that."

languages.text: «Lady Navegante, mientras ese maldito xenos me diseccionaba, se jactaba del mecanismo de tortura al que la tenía sometida. Lamento que haya tenido que sufrir eso».
languages.original_text: "Lady Navigator, while that xenos wretch was dissecting me, it boasted about your torture mechanism. I am sorry you had to endure that."

traits.locale_text: «Lady Navegante, mientras ese maldito xenos me diseccionaba, se jactaba del mecanismo de tortura al que la tenía sometida. Lamento que haya tenido que sufrir eso».

languages.text: 「ナビゲーター殿、あの異種族の卑劣漢が私を解剖していたとき、奴はあなたの拷問機構について自慢げに語っていました。あなたがあのような目に遭わねばならなかったこと、心からお気の毒に思います」
languages.original_text: "Lady Navigator, while that xenos wretch was dissecting me, it boasted about your torture mechanism. I am sorry you had to endure that."

traits.locale_text: 「ナビゲーター殿、あの異種族の卑劣漢が私を解剖していたとき、奴はあなたの拷問機構について自慢げに語っていました。あなたがあのような目に遭わねばならなかったこと、心からお気の毒に思います」

languages.text: “导航者女士，那个卑鄙的异形解剖我时，也曾向我吹嘘你所经受过的折磨。很遗憾你不得不承受那些痛苦。”
languages.original_text: "Lady Navigator, while that xenos wretch was dissecting me, it boasted about your torture mechanism. I am sorry you had to endure that."

traits.locale_text: “导航者女士，那个卑鄙的异形解剖我时，也曾向我吹嘘你所经受过的折磨。很遗憾你不得不承受那些痛苦。”

languages.text: "Lady Navigator, als mich dieser verfluchte Xenos sezierte hat er mit Eurem Foltermechanismus geprahlt. Es tut mir leid, dass Ihr das ertragen musstet."
languages.original_text: "Lady Navigator, while that xenos wretch was dissecting me, it boasted about your torture mechanism. I am sorry you had to endure that."

traits.locale_text: "Lady Navigator, als mich dieser verfluchte Xenos sezierte hat er mit Eurem Foltermechanismus geprahlt. Es tut mir leid, dass Ihr das ertragen musstet."

languages.text: « Dame navigatrice, pendant que ce misérable xénos me disséquait, il s'est vanté au sujet de votre mécanisme de torture. Je regrette ce que vous avez dû endurer. »
languages.original_text: "Lady Navigator, while that xenos wretch was dissecting me, it boasted about your torture mechanism. I am sorry you had to endure that."

traits.locale_text: « Dame navigatrice, pendant que ce misérable xénos me disséquait, il s'est vanté au sujet de votre mécanisme de torture. Je regrette ce que vous avez dû endurer. »

languages.text: "Leydi Rotacı, o sefil zeno beni kesip biçerken işkence mekanizmanızla övünüyordu. Buna katlanmak zorunda kaldığınız için üzgünüm."
languages.original_text: "Lady Navigator, while that xenos wretch was dissecting me, it boasted about your torture mechanism. I am sorry you had to endure that."

traits.locale_text: "Leydi Rotacı, o sefil zeno beni kesip biçerken işkence mekanizmanızla övünüyordu. Buna katlanmak zorunda kaldığınız için üzgünüm."
